title: 熱流体工学Ⅰ 中間試験対策
subtitle: 演習全問＋課題全問を参考に作成・数字変更済 ｜ ⚠️ 答えは有効数字3桁で入力
subject: 熱流体工学Ⅰ

problems.q:
間隙 $Y = 1.0\ \mathrm{mm}$、比重 $s = 0.90$ の油が満たされたシリンダを、速度 $U = 5.0\ \mathrm{m/s}$ でピストンが動いている。せん断応力 $\tau = 3.60\ \mathrm{Pa}$ のとき、動粘度 $\nu$ を求めよ。
（小さい数は 8e-7 のように入力可）
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 110" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="18" width="240" height="74" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2" rx="2"/>
<rect x="54" y="20" width="204" height="70" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)"/>
<rect x="20" y="18" width="34" height="74" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2"/>
<line x1="56" y1="55" x2="78" y2="55" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="78,51 78,59 86,55" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="36" y="14" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">U →</text>
<text x="155" y="59" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">油（μ, ν）</text>
<line x1="252" y1="20" x2="258" y2="20" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<line x1="252" y1="92" x2="258" y2="92" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<line x1="255" y1="20" x2="255" y2="92" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<text x="261" y="61" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif" font-style="italic">Y</text>
<text x="37" y="107" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">ピストン</text>
<text x="160" y="107" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">固定シリンダ</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
① $\tau = \mu(U/Y) \Rightarrow \mu = \tau Y/U$
② $\rho = s \times 1000$
③ $\nu = \mu/\rho$

problems.q: 間隔 $h = 20\ \mathrm{mm}$ の固定平行2平面に $\mu = 0.80\ \mathrm{Pa{\cdot}s}$ の油が満たされている。面積 $A = 0.30\ \mathrm{m^2}$ の薄い板を固定面から $Y_1 = 8.0\ \mathrm{mm}$ の位置に置き、速度 $U = 0.50\ \mathrm{m/s}$ で引くのに必要な力 $F$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 158" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="5"   width="220" height="18" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="20" y="23"  width="220" height="35" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)"/>
<rect x="20" y="58"  width="220" height="13" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2"/>
<rect x="20" y="71"  width="220" height="52" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)"/>
<rect x="20" y="123" width="220" height="18" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="244" y1="58" x2="265" y2="58" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="265,54 265,62 273,58" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="275" y="63" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">F, U</text>
<line x1="8" y1="23" x2="14" y2="23" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="8" y1="58" x2="14" y2="58" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="11" y1="23" x2="11" y2="58" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="43" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">Y₁</text>
<line x1="8" y1="71"  x2="14" y2="71"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="8" y1="123" x2="14" y2="123" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="11" y1="71" x2="11" y2="123" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="100" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">Y₂</text>
<text x="130" y="15"  fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">固定壁</text>
<text x="130" y="68"  fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">動板（面積 A）</text>
<text x="130" y="133" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">固定壁</text>
</svg>
problems.hint: $F = \mu A U\left(\dfrac{1}{Y_1} + \dfrac{1}{Y_2}\right)$　$(Y_2 = h - Y_1 = 12\ \mathrm{mm})$

problems.q: 底面積 $A = 0.04\ \mathrm{m^2}$、質量 $m = 40\ \mathrm{kg}$ の物体が傾斜角 $\theta = 30°$ の斜面上を油膜（厚さ $\delta = 0.020\ \mathrm{mm}$、粘性係数 $\mu = 0.020\ \mathrm{Pa{\cdot}s}$）の上を滑落する。最大速度 $U_{\mathrm{max}}$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 160" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<polygon points="30,145 250,45 250,155 30,155" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="80" y="80" width="90" height="38" rx="3" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2" transform="rotate(-24.6,125,99)"/>
<text x="120" y="105" fill="#e8eaf6" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(-24.6,125,99)">m</text>
<path d="M60,145 A25,25 0 0,0 82,124" fill="none" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2"/>
<text x="68" y="128" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">θ</text>
<line x1="30" y1="50" x2="30" y2="80" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="26,78 34,78 30,86" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="34" y="74" fill="#f87171" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">g</text>
<text x="200" y="130" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">油膜 δ</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
つり合い: $mg\sin\theta = \mu A(U_{\mathrm{max}}/\delta)$
$\Rightarrow U_{\mathrm{max}} = \dfrac{\delta\, mg\sin\theta}{\mu A}$

problems.q: 水面下 $h = 12\ \mathrm{m}$ における水の圧力を求めよ。大気圧 $P_0 = 101\ \mathrm{kPa}$ とする。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 170" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="30" y="30" width="140" height="130" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="30" y1="30" x2="170" y2="30" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="100" y="22" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<line x1="100" y1="30" x2="100" y2="140" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
<line x1="94" y1="30"  x2="106" y2="30"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="94" y1="140" x2="106" y2="140" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="112" y="92" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
<circle cx="100" cy="148" r="5" fill="#a5b4fc"/>
<line x1="100" y1="140" x2="100" y2="153" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="96,150 104,150 100,158" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="110" y="158" fill="#f87171" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">P ?</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
ゲージ圧: $p = \rho g h$
絶対圧: $P = P_0 + p$

problems.q: 小ピストン直径 $d_1 = 20\ \mathrm{mm}$ に $F_1 = 10\ \mathrm{N}$ を加えた。液体の圧力 $P$ と大ピストン直径 $d_2 = 80\ \mathrm{mm}$ に生じる力 $F_2$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 140" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="50" width="28" height="70" rx="2" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="232" y="20" width="28" height="100" rx="2" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="28" y="86" width="14" height="18" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="232" y="56" width="14" height="36" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="42" y="90" width="190" height="10" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.25)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="35" y1="30" x2="35" y2="86" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="31,85 39,85 35,93" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="30" y="24" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">F₁↓</text>
<line x1="239" y1="140" x2="239" y2="95" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="235,97 243,97 239,89" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="228" y="150" fill="#f87171" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">F₂↑</text>
<text x="34" y="130" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">d₁</text>
<text x="238" y="130" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">d₂</text>
</svg>

problems.q: レバーのA端（$l_1 = 150\ \mathrm{mm}$）に $f = 300\ \mathrm{N}$ を加えたとき、B端（$l_2 = 50\ \mathrm{mm}$）の小ピストン（$d_1 = 40\ \mathrm{mm}$）に力が伝わる。大ピストン（$d_2 = 160\ \mathrm{mm}$）に生じる力 $F_2$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 175" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<line x1="30" y1="75" x2="220" y2="75" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="3"/>
<circle cx="130" cy="75" r="6" fill="#9ca3af"/>
<line x1="30" y1="40" x2="30" y2="75" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="26,73 34,73 30,81" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="22" y="34" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">f↓</text>
<text x="24" y="90" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">A</text>
<text x="198" y="90" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">B</text>
<rect x="205" y="75" width="22" height="55" rx="2" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="208" y="94" width="16" height="20" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="236" y="95" width="34" height="80" rx="2" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="236" y="115" width="34" height="34" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="227" y="108" width="9" height="10" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.25)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="253" y1="165" x2="253" y2="150" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="249,152 257,152 253,144" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="245" y="173" fill="#f87171" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">F₂↑</text>
<text x="214" y="170" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">d₁</text>
<text x="253" y="99" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">d₂</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
① てこ: $F_1 = f \times l_1/l_2$
② パスカル: $F_2 = (d_2/d_1)^2 \times F_1$

problems.q: U字管マノメータで両腕は水（$\rho = 1000\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）、底部は水銀（$\rho' = 13600\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）。$h = 0.50\ \mathrm{m}$、$y_1 = 0.80\ \mathrm{m}$、$y_2 = 0.30\ \mathrm{m}$。圧力差 $P_1 - P_2$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 220 185" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="40" y="20" width="24" height="130" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="156" y="20" width="24" height="130" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="40" y="150" width="140" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="42" y="55" width="20" height="95" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.2)"/>
<rect x="158" y="80" width="20" height="70" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.2)"/>
<rect x="42" y="150" width="136" height="18" fill="rgba(180,180,200,.25)"/>
<text x="52" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">P₁</text>
<text x="168" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">P₂</text>
<line x1="10" y1="55"  x2="40"  y2="55"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="10" y1="150" x2="40"  y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="14" y1="55"  x2="14"  y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="108" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">y₁</text>
<line x1="186" y1="80"  x2="210" y2="80"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="186" y1="150" x2="210" y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="207" y1="80"  x2="207" y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="211" y="118" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">y₂</text>
<line x1="186" y1="150" x2="210" y2="150" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="186" y1="168" x2="210" y2="168" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="207" y1="150" x2="207" y2="168" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="211" y="162" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
<text x="110" y="163" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水銀(ρ')</text>
<text x="52" y="100" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水</text>
<text x="168" y="115" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
基準面Aで等値:
左: $P_A = P_1 + \rho g y_1$
右: $P_A = P_2 + \rho g y_2 + \rho' g h$
$\Rightarrow P_1-P_2 = \rho g(y_2-y_1) + \rho' g h$

problems.q: 逆U字管マノメータで両腕は水（$\rho = 1000\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）、上部は軽い液体（$\rho' = 800\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）。$h = 0.20\ \mathrm{m}$、$y_1 = 0.70\ \mathrm{m}$、$y_2 = 0.30\ \mathrm{m}$。圧力差 $P_1 - P_2$ を求めよ。

<text x="168" y="8" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">P₂</text>
<line x1="10" y1="35"  x2="40"  y2="35"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="10" y1="125" x2="40"  y2="125" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="14" y1="35"  x2="14"  y2="125" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="84" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">y₁</text>
<line x1="186" y1="35"  x2="210" y2="35"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="186" y1="145" x2="210" y2="145" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="207" y1="35"  x2="207" y2="145" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="211" y="94" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">y₂</text>
<line x1="10" y1="35"  x2="40"  y2="35"  stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="10" y1="15"  x2="40"  y2="15"  stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="14" y1="15"  x2="14"  y2="35"  stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="28" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
<text x="52" y="80" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水</text>
<text x="168" y="90" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
逆U字管の基準面Aで等値:
$P_1-P_2 = \rho_1 g y_1 - \rho' g h - \rho_2 g y_2$

problems.q: 水面に対して垂直な円板（直径 $d = 1.0\ \mathrm{m}$）が図心深さ $h_G = 1.5\ \mathrm{m}$ の位置にある。板に作用する合力 $F$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 210 185" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="30" y="20" width="150" height="155" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="30" y1="20" x2="180" y2="20" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="105" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<ellipse cx="105" cy="105" rx="18" ry="48" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2"/>
<line x1="8" y1="20"  x2="22" y2="20"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="8" y1="105" x2="22" y2="105" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="105" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="67" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">hG</text>
<line x1="125" y1="105" x2="158" y2="105" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="156,101 156,109 164,105" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="166" y="109" fill="#f87171" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">F</text>
<text x="105" y="108" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">円板 d</text>
</svg>
problems.hint: $F = \rho g\, h_G A$　$(A = \pi d^2/4)$

problems.q: 壁面 AB が半径 $r = 0.8\ \mathrm{m}$、幅 $b = 1.5\ \mathrm{m}$ の 1/4 円筒面。水面から A までの深さ $h = 0.5\ \mathrm{m}$。水平分力 $F_x$・鉛直分力 $F_y$・合力 $F$・方向角 $\alpha$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 210 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="20" width="150" height="160" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="20" y1="20" x2="170" y2="20" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="90" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<path d="M 20,60 Q 170,60 170,180" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="18" y="62" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">A</text>
<text x="158" y="178" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">B</text>
<line x1="172" y1="20" x2="190" y2="20" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="172" y1="60" x2="190" y2="60" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="186" y1="20" x2="186" y2="60" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="192" y="44" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
<line x1="20" y1="60" x2="170" y2="60" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
<text x="95" y="120" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">r</text>
<line x1="20" y1="60" x2="170" y2="180" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>
</svg>
problems.hint:
$F_x = \rho g(h + r/2)\cdot b r$　（鉛直投影面への静水圧）
$F_y = \rho g(\pi r^2/4 + hr)\cdot b$　（上部液体の重量）
$F = \sqrt{F_x^2+F_y^2}$、$\alpha = \arctan(F_y/F_x)$

problems.q: 密度 $\rho = 800\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$、一辺 $L = 0.40\ \mathrm{m}$ の立方体の木材が水（$\rho_w = 1000\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）に浮いている。水面下に沈んでいる深さ $h$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 180 175" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="20" width="140" height="145" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="20" y1="20" x2="160" y2="20" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="90" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<rect x="55" y="20" width="70" height="70" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2"/>
<text x="90" y="62" fill="#e8eaf6" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">木材</text>
<text x="90" y="74" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">L×L</text>
<line x1="160" y1="20" x2="174" y2="20" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="160" y1="90" x2="174" y2="90" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="169" y1="20" x2="169" y2="90" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="152" y="57" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
浮力 = 重力：$\rho_w g L^2 h = \rho_\mathrm{wood} g L^3$
$\Rightarrow h = \dfrac{\rho_\mathrm{wood}\cdot L}{\rho_w}$

problems.q: 内径 $d_1 = 120\ \mathrm{mm}$ の管を流速 $u_1 = 2.0\ \mathrm{m/s}$ で流れる水が内径 $d_2 = 40\ \mathrm{mm}$ に縮小した。断面②での流速 $u_2$ を求めよ。

<svg viewBox="0 0 280 110" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<line x1="195" y1="55" x2="218" y2="55" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="216,51 216,59 224,55" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="188" y="50" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">u₂</text>
<text x="190" y="70" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">d₂</text>
</svg>

problems.q: 内径 $d_1 = 80\ \mathrm{mm}$、流速 $u_1 = 4.0\ \mathrm{m/s}$ の流れが $d_2 = 60\ \mathrm{mm}$（管②）と $d_3 = 40\ \mathrm{mm}$（管③）に等量分岐する。流量 $Q_1$、流速 $u_2$、$u_3$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M20,65 L120,65 L120,55 L180,30 L180,40 L130,62 L130,88 L180,110 L180,120 L120,95 L120,85 L20,85 Z" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>

<text x="182" y="132" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">d₃③</text>
</svg>

problems.q: 水平管が $d_1 = 60\ \mathrm{mm}$ から $d_2 = 30\ \mathrm{mm}$ に縮小している。断面①の流速 $u_1 = 3.0\ \mathrm{m/s}$、圧力 $p_1 = 180\ \mathrm{kPa}$（高さは同じ）。断面②の流速 $u_2$ と圧力 $p_2$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 280 110" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M20,30 L100,30 L140,45 L250,45 L250,65 L140,65 L100,80 L20,80 Z" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>

<text x="25" y="95" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">① d₁</text>

</svg>

problems.q: 液面から $H = 5.0\ \mathrm{m}$ 下の小孔からの噴出速度 $u$ を求めよ。（液面速度は無視してよい）
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 185" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="30" y="20" width="120" height="145" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="30" y1="20" x2="150" y2="20" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="90" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<circle cx="30" cy="165" r="5" fill="#60a5fa"/>
<line x1="155" y1="20"  x2="170" y2="20"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="155" y1="165" x2="170" y2="165" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="163" y1="20"  x2="163" y2="165" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="172" y="97" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" font-style="italic">H</text>
<line x1="30" y1="165" x2="62" y2="165" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="60,161 60,169 68,165" fill="#56cfb2"/>
<text x="70" y="162" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">u=?</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
液面①と小孔②にベルヌーイ適用（どちらも $P_0$）:
$P_0 + \rho gH = P_0 + \rho u^2/2$
$\Rightarrow u = \sqrt{2gH}$

problems.tag: 密度・比容積・粘性係数
problems.q: 動粘度 $\nu = 2.00\times10^{-5}\ \mathrm{m^2/s}$ の油の体積 $V = 30\times10^{-3}\ \mathrm{m^3}$、質量 $m = 24.0\ \mathrm{kg}$。密度 $\rho$、比容積 $v$（= V/m）、粘性係数 $\mu$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="40" y="30" width="120" height="85" rx="4" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2"/>
<rect x="40" y="30" width="120" height="22" rx="4" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.07)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="100" y="45" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">油（V m³）</text>
<text x="100" y="82" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">ρ, ν, μ = ?</text>
<line x1="20" y1="115" x2="180" y2="115" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,3"/>
<line x1="100" y1="115" x2="100" y2="125" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<polygon points="96,123 104,123 100,129" fill="#9ca3af"/>
<text x="100" y="120" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">台ばかり: m kg</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
$\rho = m/V$
$v = 1/\rho$（または $V/m$）
$\mu = \nu \times \rho$

problems.q: 圧力 $P = 80\ \mathrm{kPa}$ は水柱何 m に相当するか求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 160 175" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="50" y="20" width="60" height="130" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.2)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2"/>
<line x1="50" y1="20" x2="110" y2="20" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="80" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<line x1="115" y1="20"  x2="128" y2="20"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="115" y1="150" x2="128" y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="122" y1="20"  x2="122" y2="150" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="130" y="90" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" font-style="italic">h = ?</text>
<line x1="80" y1="150" x2="80" y2="162" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="2"/>
<polygon points="76,160 84,160 80,168" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="60" y="173" fill="#f87171" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">P = 80 kPa</text>
</svg>
problems.hint: $P = \rho g h \Rightarrow h = P/(\rho g)$

problems.tag: U字管（液面高さを求める）
problems.q: U字管で液体は水（$\rho=1000\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）、底部は水銀（$\rho'=13600\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）。$P_1-P_2=50\ \mathrm{kPa}$、$h=0.40\ \mathrm{m}$、$y_0=0.25\ \mathrm{m}$。左管の水銀面からの水位 $y_1$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 230 185" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="40" y="20" width="24" height="130" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="166" y="20" width="24" height="130" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="40" y="150" width="150" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="42" y="40" width="20" height="110" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.2)"/>
<rect x="168" y="65" width="20" height="85" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.2)"/>
<rect x="42" y="150" width="146" height="18" fill="rgba(180,180,200,.25)"/>
<text x="52"  y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">P₁</text>
<text x="178" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">P₂</text>
<text x="52"  y="35" fill="#a3e635" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">y₁=?</text>
<text x="178" y="60" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">y₀</text>
<text x="118" y="163" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水銀(ρ')</text>
<line x1="8" y1="150" x2="38" y2="150" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
<line x1="8" y1="168" x2="38" y2="168" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
<line x1="12" y1="150" x2="12" y2="168" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="162" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
左水銀面で圧力を等値:
$P_1 + \rho g y_1 = P_2 + \rho g y_0 + \rho' g h$
$\Rightarrow y_1 = y_0 + (P_2-P_1)/(\rho g) + (\rho'/\rho)h$

problems.tag: 傾斜平面板（合力・作用点）
problems.q: 傾斜した円板（$d=2.0\ \mathrm{m}$）が水中に置かれている。上端の水深 $h_1=0.80\ \mathrm{m}$、下端 $h_2=2.0\ \mathrm{m}$。合力 $F$ と水面から板面に沿った作用点距離 $y_c$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 220 185" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="20" width="160" height="155" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="20" y1="20" x2="180" y2="20" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="100" y="14" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<ellipse cx="100" cy="105" rx="14" ry="60" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2" transform="rotate(-20,100,105)"/>
<line x1="5" y1="40"  x2="20"  y2="40"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="5" y1="90"  x2="20"  y2="90"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="9" y1="40"  x2="9"   y2="90"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="68" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">h₁</text>
<line x1="5" y1="122" x2="20"  y2="122" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="5" y1="172" x2="20"  y2="172" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="9" y1="122" x2="9"   y2="172" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="0" y="150" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">h₂</text>
<text x="100" y="108" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">d</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
$h_G = (h_1+h_2)/2$、$A = \pi d^2/4$
$F = \rho g h_G A$
$\sin\theta = (h_2-h_1)/d$、$s_G = h_G/\sin\theta$
$y_c = s_G + I_G/(A s_G)$　$[I_G = \pi d^4/64]$

problems.q: 比重 $s=0.70$、長さ $L=1.5\ \mathrm{m}$、一辺 $a=6.0\ \mathrm{cm}$ の木片の一端に質量 $m_{\mathrm{pb}}=1.2\ \mathrm{kg}$（比重11.5）の鉛を付けて水中に入れたところ浮いた。水面から突き出た長さ $h$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 180 195" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="30" y="50" width="120" height="135" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="30" y1="50" x2="150" y2="50" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="90" y="44" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<rect x="65" y="50"  width="50" height="20"  rx="2" fill="#1e2235" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<rect x="65" y="70"  width="50" height="80"  rx="2" fill="#2d3154" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2"/>
<rect x="75" y="150" width="30" height="20" rx="2" fill="#6b7280" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="90" y="115" fill="#e8eaf6" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">木材</text>
<text x="90" y="164" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">鉛</text>
<line x1="152" y1="50" x2="166" y2="50" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="152" y1="70" x2="166" y2="70" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="159" y1="50" x2="159" y2="70" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="168" y="63" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
全重力 $W = (m_\mathrm{wood} + m_\mathrm{pb})g$
沈み長さ $= L-h$
浮力 $B = \rho_w g[a^2(L-h) + V_\mathrm{pb}]$
$W = B$ を解く

problems.tag: 下向き3断面ベルヌーイ
problems.q:
大きなタンクの底面に $d=60\ \mathrm{mm}$ の円管（$\rho=1000\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$）。底面から水面 $H_1=1.2\ \mathrm{m}$、出口②は底面から $H_2=0.5\ \mathrm{m}$ 下方（大気圧）。断面①はタンク底面の管入口。②からさらに $H_3=0.8\ \mathrm{m}$ 下方が断面③（自由噴流）。
（1）出口②の流速 $u_2$　（2）断面①のゲージ圧 $p_1$　（3）断面③の流速 $u_3$　（4）断面③の直径 $d_3$
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 220 230" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="10" width="140" height="80" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="20" y1="10" x2="160" y2="10" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="90" y="5" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<line x1="80" y1="90" x2="80" y2="10" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
<line x1="160" y1="60" x2="180" y2="60" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="160" y1="10" x2="180" y2="10" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="175" y1="10" x2="175" y2="60" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="182" y="39" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">H₁</text>
<rect x="70" y="90" width="20" height="65" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.2)" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="90" y="96" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">①</text>
<line x1="92" y1="90"  x2="110" y2="90"  stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="92" y1="155" x2="110" y2="155" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="106" y1="90" x2="106" y2="155" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="112" y="127" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">H₂</text>
<circle cx="80" cy="155" r="4" fill="#a5b4fc"/>
<text x="92" y="153" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">② 出口(P=P₀)</text>
<line x1="80" y1="159" x2="80" y2="205" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
<line x1="92" y1="155" x2="110" y2="155" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="92" y1="205" x2="110" y2="205" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="106" y1="155" x2="106" y2="205" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="112" y="184" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">H₃</text>
<text x="68" y="214" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">③ 自由噴流</text>
</svg>

problems.tag: 傾斜拡大管ベルヌーイ
problems.q:
傾斜拡大管。$d_1=60\ \mathrm{mm}$（断面①）、$d_2=90\ \mathrm{mm}$（断面②）、高さ $z_1=20\ \mathrm{cm}$、$z_2=50\ \mathrm{cm}$、$v_1=1.5\ \mathrm{m/s}$。
（1）流量 $Q$　（2）流速 $v_2$　（3）$P_1=8.0\ \mathrm{kPa}$ のとき $P_2$
problems.svg:

problems.q: 1/4 円弧面 AB（$r=1.2\ \mathrm{m}$、タンク幅 $b=1.2\ \mathrm{m}$）に水が作用。A は水面から $h=0.8\ \mathrm{m}$ 下方、B は A の鉛直下 $r$ の位置。合力 $F$ と水平方向からの角度 $\alpha$ を求めよ。
problems.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 220 195" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect x="20" y="15" width="160" height="170" fill="rgba(59,130,246,.14)" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
<line x1="20" y1="15" x2="180" y2="15" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<text x="100" y="10" fill="#60a5fa" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">水面</text>
<path d="M 180,65 Q 180,185 60,185" fill="rgba(30,34,53,.8)" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="2.5"/>
<line x1="20" y1="65" x2="180" y2="65" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
<text x="178" y="63" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="end">A</text>
<text x="62" y="183" fill="#a5b4fc" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">B</text>
<line x1="182" y1="15" x2="198" y2="15" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="182" y1="65" x2="198" y2="65" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<line x1="194" y1="15" x2="194" y2="65" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1"/>
<text x="200" y="44" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">h</text>
<line x1="180" y1="65" x2="60" y2="185" stroke="#56cfb2" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>
<text x="130" y="120" fill="#56cfb2" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">r</text>
<line x1="50" y1="100" x2="70" y2="118" stroke="#f87171" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<polygon points="65,114 72,122 76,112" fill="#f87171"/>
<text x="36" y="100" fill="#f87171" font-size="9" font-family="sans-serif">Fx,Fy</text>
</svg>
problems.hint:
$F_x=\rho g(h+r/2)\cdot r\cdot b$　（鉛直投影面）
$F_y=\rho g b(hr + \pi r^2/4)$　（上方液体重量）
$F=\sqrt{F_x^2+F_y^2}$、$\alpha=\arctan(F_y/F_x)$
